Meet Your Agent

Hi, I'm Leigh-Anne

I'm a Meat on Wheels agent based right here in Welkom. I proudly help customers with fresh meat, chicken, sweets, kitchen appliances, bedding, cleaning products and tools — all in one easy order.

Whether you're stocking up for a braai, a party, or just your weekly shop, I'll sort you out and deliver straight to your door.
